title: Rings and more
description: Add a few cosmetic items such as golden ring and cigarette
body:
# A small mod that add some cosmetic items.
More items, versions or loader support might be possible.

### As of version **1.0.0**, there are 2 items:
- **Golden ring** can be equipped on the offhand/ring slot
- **Cigarette** can be used to make some particles of smoke and play a sound effect

### Requirements:
- Fabric API
- Trinket
